message:
feat(messaging): certificate-carrying request/reply protocol and chunked reply obligations

Add the typed certificate and obligation infrastructure for the FABRIC
request/reply hot path.

RequestCertificate:
- Issued after admission validation with caller, subject, delivery class,
  reply space rule, service class, capability fingerprint, and timeout
- from_validated() builder, validate() schema check, digest() for audit
- is_stale(now) timeout check

ReplyCertificate:
- Issued on successful reply with request_id linkage, responder identity,
  reply subject, payload hash, and delivery class
- from_obligation() builder connecting to ServiceObligation
- digest() for audit, validate() schema check

ChunkedReplyObligation:
- Multi-chunk reply delivery with per-chunk tracking against ObligationLedger
- reserve_chunk()/commit_chunk()/fail_chunk() with chunk_index validation
- complete() finalizes the reply obligation after all chunks commit
- all_committed()/any_failed() progress queries
- Chunk state machine: Reserved→Committed or Reserved→Failed

ServiceObligation updates:
- abort() now returns Result (respects resolved guard)
- commit_with_reply() returns ReplyCertificate
- Updated mod.rs re-exports

tests/fabric_properties.rs:
- Updated abort() call site to use .expect()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
